/usr/bin/cc  -target arm64-apple-ios -mcpu=apple-a8 -fcommon -fobjc-arc -ObjC -Wno-error=implicit-function-declaration -F'/Volumes/D/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/iPhoneOS.platform/Developer/SDKs/iPhoneOS26.2.sdk/System/Cryptexes/OS/System/Library/Frameworks' -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Volumes/D/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/iPhoneOS.platform/Developer/SDKs/iPhoneOS26.2.sdk -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names  -rpath @loader_path -rpath @executable_path/java_runtimes/java-8-openjdk/lib -rpath /usr/lib/jvm/java-8-openjdk/lib -rpath @executable_path/Frameworks -rpath @loader_path/Frameworks -o libAFNetworking.dylib -install_name @rpath/libAFNetworking.dylib CMakeFiles/AFNetworking.dir/external/AFNetworking/AFNetworking/AFSecurityPolicy.m.o CMakeFiles/AFNetworking.dir/external/AFNetworking/AFNetworking/AFHTTPSessionManager.m.o CMakeFiles/AFNetworking.dir/external/AFNetworking/AFNetworking/AFURLRequestSerialization.m.o CMakeFiles/AFNetworking.dir/external/AFNetworking/AFNetworking/AFURLSessionManager.m.o CMakeFiles/AFNetworking.dir/external/AFNetworking/AFNetworking/AFNetworkReachabilityManager.m.o CMakeFiles/AFNetworking.dir/external/AFNetworking/AFNetworking/AFURLResponseSerialization.m.o CMakeFiles/AFNetworking.dir/external/AFNetworking/UIKit+AFNetworking/AFNetworkActivityIndicatorManager.m.o CMakeFiles/AFNetworking.dir/external/AFNetworking/UIKit+AFNetworking/AFAutoPurgingImageCache.m.o CMakeFiles/AFNetworking.dir/external/AFNetworking/UIKit+AFNetworking/AFImageDownloader.m.o CMakeFiles/AFNetworking.dir/external/AFNetworking/UIKit+AFNetworking/UIButton+AFNetworking.m.o CMakeFiles/AFNetworking.dir/external/AFNetworking/UIKit+AFNetworking/UIImageView+AFNetworking.m.o  -framework CoreGraphics -framework CoreServices -framework Security -framework SystemConfiguration -framework UIKit
